nodes.title: Load Suppliers List
nodes.description: When page loads or after mutation, set loading=true and call GET /api/businesses/:bizId/suppliers. Success: stores suppliers and renders list. Failure: keeps existing list and shows error toast before ending loading.

nodes.title: Compute Supplier Summary
nodes.description: After loading suppliers, derive total supplier count and unique category count used by summary cards. Empty data renders zeros.

nodes.title: Filter Suppliers By Search And Category
nodes.description: When user changes filterCategory or searchQuery, recompute filteredSuppliers: first by exact category unless 'all', then by case-insensitive match over supplier name and contactPerson.

nodes.title: Open Supplier Form
nodes.description: When user clicks add/edit, open supplier modal. In add mode reset form fields. In edit mode copy selected supplier into form and set editingId.

nodes.title: Persist Supplier
nodes.description: On save, call api.createSupplier(bizId, form) in add mode or api.updateSupplier(id, form) in edit mode. Success: close modal, show success toast, and re-load suppliers. Failure: show backend error while keeping form open.

nodes.title: Open Supplier Delete Confirmation
nodes.description: When user clicks delete, call toast.confirm with supplier label. Cancel stops flow. Confirm continues to deletion node.

nodes.title: Delete Supplier
nodes.description: After confirmation, call DELETE /api/suppliers/:id. Success: show 'تم حذف المورد بنجاح' and reload list. Failure: show backend error.
